name: praxis
description: Clarity-first agent framework — opinionated taste, a visible process loop (research → clarify → plan → subagent execution → verify), and per-project memory the agent learns. Builds systems from scratch at scale without shipping generic AI slop.

interface.shortDescription: Clarity-first process, enforced taste, and per-project memory for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Praxis to run substantial work out loud: classify the task, research first, clarify before guessing, plan into bite-sized tasks, execute one subagent per task, and verify against an enforced design Ship Gate. It learns per project so the agent stops re-deriving what your codebase already decided.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
